div1.entryFree:
Unlooked-for, 1) unexpected: Lucr. 846. John II, 79. John II, 79 R2 I, 3, 155. H6C V, 1, 14. Rom. I, 5, 31.
2) not sought after: whilst I, whom fortune of such triumph bars, u. joy in that I honour most, Sonn. 25, 4 (neglected by the world). if not, honour comes u., and there's an end, H4A V, 3, 64.
3) unwished, unwelcome: Clarence, Henry, and his son young Edward, and all the u. issue of their bodies, H6C III, 2, 131.
